description: Indoor child localization system — task tracker

tasks.title: Initialize project repository structure
tasks.notes: All directories exist: firmware/trakn_tag, backend, backend/tests, backend/tests/fixtures, web-mapping-tool, android-rtt-app, parent-app, docs, scripts, nginx.
tasks.acceptance: All directories in the file schema exist: firmware/trakn_tag, backend, web-mapping-tool, android-rtt-app, parent-app, docs, scripts. tasks.json and TRAKN_PRD.md present at root.
tasks.test_command: ls firmware backend web-mapping-tool android-rtt-app parent-app docs scripts && echo PASS

tasks.title: Set up GCP VM — Ubuntu 22.04, static IP, firewall rules
tasks.notes: Requires physical GCP console access. VM at 35.238.189.188, Ubuntu 22.04 e2-micro, TCP 443 open inbound, port 8000 internal only.
tasks.acceptance: curl -k https://35.238.189.188/health returns 200 or connection refused (nginx not yet running is acceptable). SSH into VM succeeds.
tasks.test_command: ssh ubuntu@35.238.189.188 'echo VM_OK'

tasks.title: Configure DuckDNS domain — trakn.duckdns.org → 35.238.189.188
tasks.notes: Requires DuckDNS account access to point trakn.duckdns.org → 35.238.189.188.
tasks.acceptance: nslookup trakn.duckdns.org resolves to 35.238.189.188
tasks.test_command: nslookup trakn.duckdns.org | grep 35.238.189.188 && echo PASS

tasks.title: Install Docker + Docker Compose on GCP VM
tasks.notes: Requires SSH access to GCP VM to install Docker CE and docker-compose-plugin.
tasks.acceptance: docker --version and docker compose version both return successfully on VM
tasks.test_command: docker --version && docker compose version && echo PASS

tasks.title: Write nginx/nginx.conf — reverse proxy with TLS
tasks.notes: Created nginx/nginx.conf with HTTP→HTTPS redirect, TLS 1.2/1.3, upstream to api:8000, WebSocket upgrade headers, security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options), proxy_read_timeout 86400 for WS.
tasks.acceptance: nginx -t succeeds. HTTP→HTTPS redirect works. WebSocket proxying works.
tasks.test_command: docker compose exec nginx nginx -t && echo PASS

tasks.title: Obtain Let's Encrypt TLS cert for trakn.duckdns.org via Certbot
tasks.notes: Requires running certbot on live VM with domain trakn.duckdns.org pointing to 35.238.189.188.
tasks.acceptance: curl https://trakn.duckdns.org/health returns HTTP 200 with valid TLS cert (no -k flag needed)
tasks.test_command: curl https://trakn.duckdns.org/health && echo PASS

tasks.title: Write scripts/setup_db.sql — full PostgreSQL 16 schema
tasks.notes: Created scripts/setup_db.sql with all 7 tables: venues, grid_points, access_points, radio_map, users, devices, positions. Includes indexes, foreign keys, UUIDs via pgcrypto, BIGSERIAL for positions, updated_at trigger for access_points.
tasks.acceptance: psql -f scripts/setup_db.sql succeeds with no errors
tasks.test_command: psql -f scripts/setup_db.sql && echo PASS

tasks.title: Write backend/requirements.txt
tasks.notes: Created backend/requirements.txt with all pinned dependencies: fastapi 0.111.0, uvicorn 0.29.0, sqlalchemy[asyncio] 2.0.30, asyncpg 0.29.0, python-jose, passlib[bcrypt], numpy 1.26.4, scipy 1.13.0, slowapi 0.1.9, httpx, pytest, pytest-asyncio, anyio.
tasks.acceptance: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt succeeds
tasks.test_command: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && echo PASS

tasks.title: Write backend/Dockerfile
tasks.notes: Created backend/Dockerfile: python:3.11-slim, WORKDIR /app, copies requirements.txt + main.py, EXPOSE 8000, CMD uvicorn main:app on 0.0.0.0:8000.
tasks.acceptance: docker build backend/ succeeds
tasks.test_command: docker build backend/ && echo PASS

tasks.title: Write docker-compose.yml at project root
tasks.notes: Created docker-compose.yml at project root with nginx (443/80), api (build: ./backend, internal 8000), db (postgres:16, pgdata volume, mounts setup_db.sql as init script). All env vars from .env file.
tasks.acceptance: docker compose config validates cleanly
tasks.test_command: docker compose config && echo PASS

tasks.title: Write firmware/trakn_tag/config.h — all hardware constants
tasks.notes: Created firmware/trakn_tag/config.h with all locked constants: ACCEL_SCALE=0.0011978149, GYRO_SCALE=0.0002663309, MPU6050_ADDR=0x68, all register addresses, K_WEIN=0.47, P_WEIN=0.25, stride clamp [0.25, 1.40], SAMPLING_RATE_HZ=100, DEVICE_MAC, API endpoints.
tasks.acceptance: Compiles with Arduino IDE without errors
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Write firmware/trakn_tag/imu.h + imu.cpp — MPU6050 driver
tasks.notes: Created imu.h (IMUData struct, imuInit(), imuRead()) and imu.cpp (14-byte burst read from 0x3B, register init sequence: PWR_MGMT_1, CONFIG/DLPF, GYRO_CONFIG, ACCEL_CONFIG). Converts raw ADC to SI units using locked scale constants.
tasks.acceptance: MPU6050 reads valid accel/gyro over I2C
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Write firmware/trakn_tag/wifi_conn.h + wifi_conn.cpp
tasks.notes: Created wifi_conn.h/cpp: wifiConnect() with 1s backoff retry up to WIFI_MAX_RETRIES, wifiIsConnected(), wifiReconnectIfNeeded() non-blocking guard with WIFI_RETRY_DELAY_MS interval.
tasks.acceptance: Device connects to WiFi on startup and reconnects if disconnected
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Write firmware/trakn_tag/wifi_scanner.h + wifi_scanner.cpp
tasks.notes: Created wifi_scanner.h/cpp: WifiEntry struct (bssid, ssid, rssi, freq), wifiScanTrigger() non-blocking async scan, wifiScanComplete() polling, wifiCollectResults() returns top-4 by RSSI with selection sort.
tasks.acceptance: Scans return top 4 APs by RSSI without blocking the main loop
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Write firmware/trakn_tag/http_client.h + http_client.cpp
tasks.notes: Created http_client.h/cpp: httpPostPacket() using WiFiClientSecure (setInsecure) + HTTPClient, sets Content-Type: application/json and X-TRAKN-API-Key header, returns true on HTTP 200.
tasks.acceptance: POST to gateway endpoint returns 200 with valid API key
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Write firmware/trakn_tag/trakn_tag.ino — main sketch
tasks.notes: Created trakn_tag.ino: setup() initializes I2C@400kHz, MPU6050, WiFi, health check GET. loop() runs at 100Hz: reads IMU into batch, triggers WiFi scan every 1000ms, POSTs when batch full (POST_BATCH_SIZE), collects scan results, calls wifiReconnectIfNeeded().
tasks.acceptance: Sketch compiles and runs; device posts packets every ~100ms at 100Hz
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Update firmware/trakn_tag/config.h with API_KEY constant
tasks.notes: DEVICE_API_KEY defined in config.h as 'trakn-hw-REPLACE_WITH_GENERATED_KEY'. Format matches generate_api_key() spec: 'trakn-hw-' + sha256(mac+salt)[:24]. Override via compiler flag -DDEVICE_API_KEY='...' at build time.
tasks.acceptance: DEVICE_API_KEY constant present and matches the format
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Section 1: Imports & Configuration
tasks.notes: All secrets from os.getenv(): DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, DEVICE_API_KEY_SALT. JWT_ALGORITHM=HS256, JWT_EXPIRY_DAYS=7. slowapi Limiter initialized. All required imports present.
tasks.acceptance: import main succeeds with no errors
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'import main' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Section 2: SQLAlchemy Database Models
tasks.notes: 7 ORM models: Venue (UUID PK), GridPoint (UUID PK, venue FK), AccessPoint (bssid PK), RadioMap (composite PK), User (UUID PK, unique email), Device (mac PK, owner FK), Position (BIGSERIAL PK). All FKs with cascade actions.
tasks.acceptance: All models map correctly to SQL schema
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'from main import Base; print(list(Base.metadata.tables.keys()))' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Section 3: Pydantic Schemas
tasks.notes: Pydantic v2 schemas with validators: MAC regex r'^([0-9A-Fa-f]{2}:){5}[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}$', RSSI [-120,0], accel [-50,50]. GatewayPacketSchema, RegisterSchema, LoginSchema, LinkDeviceSchema, AccessPointSchema, PositionResponseSchema.
tasks.acceptance: Invalid inputs raise 422 ValidationError
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'from main import GatewayPacketSchema; print("OK")' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Section 4: In-Memory Device State
tasks.notes: DeviceState dataclass with: x (5-vector), P (5x5 matrix), heading, step_count, last_step_time, buf_t/buf_a (deque maxlen=40), gyro_bias, bias_calibrated, a_mag_filt, gz_filt, rssi_state (dict), last_ts, bias_samples. get_device_state() creates on demand.
tasks.acceptance: DeviceState initializes correctly with numpy arrays
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'from main import DeviceState; s=DeviceState(); print(s.x.shape)' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — security helpers
tasks.notes: hash_password/verify_password (bcrypt cost=12), create_access_token/decode_access_token (JWT HS256 7-day), generate_api_key ('trakn-hw-'+sha256(mac+salt)[:24]), hash_api_key (sha256 hex), validate_api_key_hmac (hmac.compare_digest).
tasks.acceptance: generate_api_key returns correct format; JWT round-trip works
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'from main import generate_api_key; k=generate_api_key("24:42:E3:15:E5:72"); assert k.startswith("trakn-hw-"); print(k)' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — FastAPI app + middleware
tasks.notes: FastAPI app with CORS middleware, slowapi rate limit exception handler, HTTPBearer auth scheme, get_current_user dependency, verify_device_ownership helper.
tasks.acceptance: App starts cleanly; /health returns 200
tasks.test_command: cd backend && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &; sleep 2; curl -s http://localhost:8000/health; kill %1

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: ema_filter()
tasks.notes: ema_filter(new_val, prev_val, fc, dt): alpha = 1 - exp(-2*pi*fc*dt); returns prev + alpha*(new - prev). fc=3.2 Hz for both accel magnitude and gz.
tasks.acceptance: ema_filter(10.0, 0.0, 3.2, 0.01) converges to 10.0 over time
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py::test_ema_filter_convergence -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: weinberg_stride()
tasks.notes: weinberg_stride(swing): L = 0.47 * swing**0.25, clamped [0.25, 1.40].
tasks.acceptance: weinberg_stride(5.0) ≈ 0.703; clamp at extremes
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py::test_weinberg_stride_formula -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: is_valid_step() — 5-condition gate
tasks.notes: is_valid_step(a_max, a_min, buf, dt_since_last): all 5 conditions must hold: dt>0.35, a_max>median+2*std, swing>0.9*std, std>1.2, |mean-9.8|>0.4.
tasks.acceptance: All 5 conditions checked; step only counted when all true
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py::test_is_valid_step_all_conditions -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: gyro bias calibration
tasks.notes: Collects first BIAS_COLLECT_SAMPLES=200 gz readings, computes mean as gyro_bias. Sets bias_calibrated=True. All subsequent gz readings are corrected: gz_corrected = gz_raw - gyro_bias.
tasks.acceptance: After 200 still samples, gyro_bias matches known constant gz
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_device_state.py::test_gyro_bias_calibration -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: heading integration
tasks.notes: gz_corrected = gz_raw - bias_gz; gz_filt = EMA(gz_corrected, fc=3.2); heading += gz_filt * dt. Heading stored in state.heading and synced to state.x[2].
tasks.acceptance: Constant gz input produces linearly increasing heading
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py::test_pdr_heading_integration -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: position update on step detection
tasks.notes: On valid step: stride = weinberg_stride(swing); x += stride*cos(heading); y += stride*sin(heading); step_count++. Position stored in state.x[0], state.x[1].
tasks.acceptance: Straight walk increases state.x[0] (east component)
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — PDR: process_pdr() batch processor
tasks.notes: process_pdr(state, samples): iterates sorted IMU samples, computes dt between consecutive timestamps, applies EMA, heading integration, rolling buffer update, step detection with all 5 conditions, Weinberg stride + position update.
tasks.acceptance: Full batch processed correctly; state updated in place
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Wi-Fi: rssi_kalman_update()
tasks.notes: 1-D Kalman filter per BSSID: Q=2.0, R=9.0. State stored in rssi_state dict. Returns filtered RSSI estimate.
tasks.acceptance: Repeated same-RSSI inputs converge to that RSSI
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_wifi.py::test_rssi_kalman_converges -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Wi-Fi: rssi_to_distance()
tasks.notes: d = 1.0 * 10**((rssi_ref - rssi) / (10*n)), clamped [0.5, 100.0]. At rssi==rssi_ref, d==1.0 m.
tasks.acceptance: rssi_to_distance(-40, -40, 2.0) == 1.0
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_wifi.py::test_rssi_to_distance_at_1m -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Wi-Fi: weighted_trilateration()
tasks.notes: scipy.optimize.minimize Nelder-Mead with weights=1/d². Handles 2-AP fallback (weighted midpoint). Returns (x,y) or None if <2 APs.
tasks.acceptance: 4 equidistant APs return centroid within 3m tolerance
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_wifi.py::test_trilateration_centre -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Wi-Fi: score_intersection_points()
tasks.notes: Score_j = Σ_i w_i * exp(-(d_meas - d_est)² / (2*sigma²)), sigma=3.0, w_i=1/d_meas². Returns best-scoring candidate point.
tasks.acceptance: Best candidate is closest to true position
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_wifi.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — Wi-Fi: RSSI std gating (R_NORMAL vs R_NOISY)
tasks.notes: If std(filtered_rssi values in packet) > 5 dBm → use R_NOISY=diag([9,9]); else R_NORMAL=diag([4,4]). rssi_std passed to ekf_correct().
tasks.acceptance: Noisy WiFi packet uses larger measurement noise
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_fusion.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — process_packet() integration
tasks.notes: gateway_packet() endpoint: validates API key, runs PDR, loads known APs from DB, Kalman-filters each RSSI, calls weighted_trilateration, ekf_correct if wifi_position available, persists Position row, broadcasts via WebSocket, returns {status, position}.
tasks.acceptance: POST /api/v1/gateway/packet returns 200 with position object
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_api.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — EKF: build_transition_matrix()
tasks.notes: 5×5 matrix F: identity + F[0,3]=dt, F[1,4]=dt. State: [X, Y, heading, vx, vy].
tasks.acceptance: F[0,3]==dt, F[1,4]==dt, rest of diagonal==1
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_fusion.py::test_transition_matrix_structure -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — EKF: ekf_predict()
tasks.notes: ekf_predict(state, dt): x = F@x; P = F@P@F.T + Q. Overrides x[2] with state.heading (PDR heading takes precedence).
tasks.acceptance: Covariance grows monotonically during prediction
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_fusion.py::test_ekf_predict_increases_covariance -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — EKF: ekf_correct()
tasks.notes: ekf_correct(state, z, rssi_std): R = R_NOISY if rssi_std>5 else R_NORMAL; innovation = z - H@x; S = H@P@H.T + R; K = P@H.T@inv(S); x = x + K@innovation; P = (I - K@H)@P.
tasks.acceptance: Positional uncertainty shrinks after correction
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_fusion.py::test_ekf_correct_reduces_uncertainty -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — EKF: get_confidence()
tasks.notes: get_confidence(P) = 1.0 / (1.0 + trace(P[0:2, 0:2])). Range (0, 1]. Lower P → higher confidence.
tasks.acceptance: get_confidence(I*0.01) > get_confidence(I*100)
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_fusion.py::test_get_confidence -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Backend main.py — complete file review
tasks.notes: Complete single-file backend/main.py with all 11 sections. All API endpoints implemented. All math matches PRD spec. Startup/shutdown lifecycle handlers.
tasks.acceptance: python -m pytest backend/tests/ passes all tests
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — floor plan upload
tasks.notes: Upload tab: file input (PNG/SVG/PDF), loadFloorPlan() draws image on canvas. Venue creation via POST /api/v1/venue/floor-plan.
tasks.acceptance: Floor plan image renders on canvas after upload
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — scale setting
tasks.notes: Scale tab: user clicks 2 points on canvas (scalePoints array), enters real distance in metres, applyScale() computes px/m ratio. Scale info displayed.
tasks.acceptance: Scale ratio computed from 2-point clicks
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — wall drawing
tasks.notes: Walls tab: draw/erase/pan tool buttons. Mouse drag creates wall segments stored in walls[] array. Erase removes walls within 8px of click. Orange wall rendering on canvas.
tasks.acceptance: Wall segments drawn, stored, and rendered on canvas
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — grid generation
tasks.notes: Grid tab: configurable spacing (default 0.5m), generateGrid() creates {x,y,walkable} points in metres. exportGridToAPI() POSTs to /api/v1/venue/grid-points. Blue/red dots on canvas.
tasks.acceptance: Grid generated at correct spacing; exported to API
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — path loss calibration
tasks.notes: Calibrate tab: CSV upload (bssid,rssi,distance_m), linear regression to fit n and rssi_ref per AP. Results shown, pushAPsToAPI() sends to /api/v1/venue/ap.
tasks.acceptance: CSV fit produces valid path loss n in [1.5, 6.0]
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — RSSI heatmap
tasks.notes: Heatmap tab: AP selector, renderHeatmap() overlays log-distance RSSI heat on canvas. Color scale: blue (far) → red (close). Legend displayed.
tasks.acceptance: Heatmap renders with correct gradient per AP position
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Web Mapping Tool — authentication
tasks.notes: Auth tab: login/register forms, JWT stored in localStorage. All API calls include Bearer token. Complete single-file web-mapping-tool/index.html with Canvas API + Fetch API, no build toolchain.
tasks.acceptance: Login/register work; token persists across page loads
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Android RTT App — MainActivity.kt + Tab structure
tasks.notes: Created android-rtt-app/app/src/main/MainActivity.kt: AppCompatActivity with ViewPager2 + TabLayout, Tab1=ApDiscoveryFragment (Scan & Range + Push buttons), Tab2=MapPinFragment (floor plan canvas + Load button). Permission request for ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.
tasks.acceptance: App launches with 2 tabs

tasks.title: Android RTT App — RttScanner.kt
tasks.notes: Created RttScanner.kt: WifiRttManager ranging with coroutine wrapper. OUI offset table (Cisco, Apple, Google, TP-Link, etc). d_corrected = d_raw - offset_OUI. Returns ApEntry list with bssid, ssid, rssi, freqMhz, distanceM, distanceStd.
tasks.acceptance: RTT ranging returns corrected distances for known OUIs
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Android RTT App — MapView.kt
tasks.notes: Created MapView.kt: custom View with canvas rendering of floor plan bitmap, grid point overlays (blue=walkable, red=blocked), selected point highlight, live distance labels per AP. Touch selects nearest grid point.
tasks.acceptance: Floor plan and grid points render; touch selects points

tasks.title: Android RTT App — ApiClient.kt
tasks.notes: Created ApiClient.kt: Retrofit2 + OkHttp4 + Gson client, login() stores JWT, postAP() sends AccessPointDto to POST /api/v1/venue/ap with Bearer auth.
tasks.acceptance: postAP() returns true on 201 response

tasks.title: Android RTT App — build.gradle
tasks.notes: Created app/build.gradle: minSdk=31, targetSdk=34, compileSdk=34. Dependencies: coroutines, AndroidX, Material, Retrofit2 2.11.0, OkHttp4 4.12.0, Gson converter.
tasks.acceptance: Gradle sync succeeds

tasks.title: Flutter Parent App — pubspec.yaml

tasks.acceptance: flutter pub get succeeds

tasks.acceptance: Valid MAC links device; invalid MAC shows error

tasks.title: Flutter Parent App — lib/services/ (auth + websocket + position model)
tasks.notes: Created: auth_service.dart (JWT in flutter_secure_storage, login/register/logout, authHeaders()); websocket_service.dart (auto-reconnect exponential backoff 1→2→4→8→16→30s, ping keepalive); models/position.dart (fromJson/toJson).
tasks.acceptance: WebSocket reconnects automatically after disconnect

tasks.title: Security — rate limiting (slowapi)
tasks.notes: Rate limits in main.py: gateway 20/second per IP, login 5/minute per IP, register 3/minute per IP. slowapi Limiter with get_remote_address key function. RateLimitExceeded handler returns 429.
tasks.acceptance: Exceeding rate limit returns 429 Too Many Requests
tasks.test_command: echo MANUAL_CHECK

tasks.title: Security — input validation (Pydantic)
tasks.notes: All input validated via Pydantic v2: MAC regex, RSSI [-120,0], accel [-50,50], gyro [-35,35], password min 8 chars. Invalid input returns 422.
tasks.acceptance: Invalid MAC, out-of-range RSSI, etc. all return 422
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_security.py::test_input_validation_bad_mac -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Security — HMAC API key validation
tasks.notes: validate_api_key_hmac() uses hmac.compare_digest for constant-time comparison. API key hash stored in DB as sha256 hex. Wrong or missing key returns 401.
tasks.acceptance: Wrong API key returns 401; timing attack mitigated
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_security.py::test_api_key_hmac_validation -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Security — bcrypt password hashing
tasks.notes: passlib CryptContext with bcrypt scheme, cost=12. hash_password() and verify_password() used for register/login. Unique salts per hash.
tasks.acceptance: Same password hashed twice gives different hashes; both verify
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_security.py::test_bcrypt_password_hashing -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Security — test_security.py (4 tests)
tasks.notes: Created backend/tests/test_security.py: test_api_key_format (prefix+24hex), test_api_key_hmac_validation (correct/wrong key), test_bcrypt_password_hashing (unique salts, verify), test_input_validation_bad_mac (422).
tasks.acceptance: All 4 security tests pass
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_security.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — conftest.py (shared fixtures)
tasks.notes: Created backend/tests/conftest.py: event_loop (session), setup_db (SQLite in-memory), client (AsyncClient+ASGITransport), walk_data, ap_grid_data (JSON fixtures), registered_user (creates user+token), fresh_device_state.
tasks.acceptance: pytest collects all fixtures without error
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ --collect-only && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — fixtures/sdp1_walk.json
tasks.notes: Created synthetic 88-step walk fixture at 100Hz with realistic accel magnitude profile (walking motion: ~9.8±5 m/s²) and heading=0 (East). Includes step_count_expected, total_distance_expected_m metadata.
tasks.acceptance: JSON loads correctly; sample count and metadata present
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'import json; d=json.load(open("tests/fixtures/sdp1_walk.json")); print(len(d["samples"]), d["step_count_expected"])' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — fixtures/ap_grid_4ap.json
tasks.notes: Created 4-AP fixture: APs at corners of 20×20m room, 7 grid points (walkable + blocked), 2 test scenarios (centre of room, near AP1) with RSSI observations and position tolerance.
tasks.acceptance: JSON loads correctly; 4 APs and grid points present
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -c 'import json; d=json.load(open("tests/fixtures/ap_grid_4ap.json")); print(len(d["access_points"]), len(d["grid_points"]))' && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — test_pdr.py (6 tests)
tasks.notes: Created 6 PDR tests: EMA convergence, EMA alpha formula, Weinberg clamping, Weinberg formula, is_valid_step conditions, heading integration with constant gz.
tasks.acceptance: All 6 tests pass
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_pdr.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — test_wifi.py (5 tests)
tasks.notes: Created 5 Wi-Fi tests: Kalman convergence, Kalman smoothing (spike rejection), distance at rssi_ref==1m, distance clamping, trilateration centroid (4 equidistant APs).
tasks.acceptance: All 5 tests pass
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_wifi.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — test_fusion.py (4 tests)
tasks.notes: Created 4 EKF tests: transition matrix structure (F[0,3]=dt, F[1,4]=dt), predict increases covariance, correct reduces uncertainty, confidence formula (exact value for P=I).
tasks.acceptance: All 4 tests pass
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_fusion.py -v && echo PASS

tasks.title: Tests — test_auth.py + test_devices.py + test_api.py + test_websocket.py + test_device_state.py
tasks.notes: Created: test_auth.py (4 tests: register, duplicate, login success, wrong password); test_devices.py (2 tests: link, ownership); test_api.py (3 tests: health, unauth 403, bad API key 401); test_websocket.py (2 tests: no token, bad token); test_device_state.py (2 tests: init values, gyro calibration).
tasks.acceptance: All 13 tests pass
tasks.test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_auth.py tests/test_devices.py tests/test_api.py tests/test_device_state.py -v && echo PASS
